ETH_UCY.caveat: Endpoint neural dynamics are audited as a linear waypoint rollout proxy from current point to selected endpoint. This checks same-frame multi-agent proximity and waypoint ADE/FDE, but it is not a learned full-waypoint trajectory model, not Stage5C, not SMC, not metric, and not seconds-level.

caveat: This extends domain-local endpoint-FDE evidence to same-frame all-agent endpoint-linear waypoint safety. It strengthens safety evidence but does not replace a true learned full-trajectory neural dynamics audit.
